invalid_review_attempts.reason: Claude CLI/API error; normalized invalid and not accepted as review evidence.
Valid structured review but not closeout eligible because command-evidence/Hermes evidence was still pending; superseded after evidence capture without accepting it as pack-level review evidence.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-201 is the descriptor-only RP06 "DMS Core" service-contract and golden-case pack. Independent read-only review (Read/Grep/Glob) of the in-scope deliverables — registry.js, service.js, validators.js, model/index, contracts/dms-core-contract.json (342KB snapshot), test/model.test.js, validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs, and the closeout artifacts — confirms the pack is sound. Implementation is purely descriptor-producing: runtime_execution=false, writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true, and every no-write attestation (idempotency/lock/rollback/retry/permission/audit/object-storage/OCR/search/email) is false; fixtures are synthetic (matter_rp06_synthetic_opening). The node:test suite asserts coverage (150 units; deliverable split implementation 77 / ui 23 / fixture 4 / test 20 / hermes_evidence 4 / claude_review 7 / contract 3 / security_audit 6 / failure_recovery 6, matching the baseline), the 7 service-outcome golden cases plus a non-executing integration smoke (executes_runtime=false), the H06/C06 evidence packets, the CP00-202 / RP06.P02.M03.S01 handoff, and deepEquals the committed contract snapshot. command-evidence.json shows 20 commands at exit_code 0 with Hermes gate H06 passed (resolving attempt-02's lone P2). CP178+ review hardening is verified working: attempt-01's API ConnectionRefused was normalized to invalid_review with parsed_review=null, and the 8-item forbidden-evidence list is encoded in the manifest and registry. The authority boundary is intact — Claude review packet C06.CP00-201 is read_only with tools [Read,Grep,Glob], promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false. No production_ready or enterprise-trust overclaim exists: manifest/construction-inspection/adjudication/claude-review-result are uniformly production_ready=false / pending. Hermes H06 is a deterministic control-plane review packet/receipt construct (receipt_shape descriptor_only_service_contract_golden_case_no_write), not embedded product runtime. Unrelated dirty working-tree files (UI/amplitude HTML, .DS_Store, docx) are correctly scoped out per changed-file-scope.json. No P0/P1/P2 findings; three P3 informational findings record closeout mechanics, the standing human-final-approval requirement, and resolution of the prior command-evidence gap. Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS — a read-only reviewer recommendation. Pack closeout may proceed on this receipt; enterprise-trust closure still requires human final approval.

findings.title: Pack closeout correctly gated on this read-only review receipt
findings.details: manifest.status='in_progress', production_ready=false, and pack_level_claude_review.status='pending' with valid_review_receipts=[] and exactly_one_valid_pack_review_required=true. construction-inspection.json (verdict PENDING), adjudication.md ('Status: pending review'), and claude-review-result.json (exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, overall_verdict PENDING) are all mutually consistent. These are correct pre-closeout states, not defects: the single required valid pack-level review is this run. No premature production_ready or enterprise-trust claim appears anywhere in the pack (production_ready_flag is a named gate string, not a satisfied boolean).
findings.recommendation: Record this PASS receipt as the one valid pack-level review and let the closeout pipeline flip the pending gates. No source change required.

findings.title: Authority boundary intact — review is advisory, not final approval
findings.details: The CP201 no-write attestation sets promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false (mirrored in registry.js source and asserted in validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs and test/model.test.js). Claude review packet C06.CP00-201 is read_only=true with allowed_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob]. Hermes H06 is a control-plane review packet/receipt construct (receipt_shape descriptor_only_service_contract_golden_case_no_write), not embedded product runtime. This PASS is therefore a read-only reviewer recommendation; Claude is not the final approver and human final approval remains required before any enterprise-trust/production claim can be closed.
findings.recommendation: Keep enterprise-trust closure behind human final approval; do not treat this receipt as production sign-off.

findings.title: Prior attempt-02 command-evidence gap confirmed resolved; CP178+ hardening verified
findings.details: Attempt-02's sole P2 (empty commands array) is no longer present: command-evidence.json now records 20 commands all exit_code=0 (node --check of registry/service/validators/test/validate script; node --test; rp06:dms-core:validate; closeout review baseline+ready; npm test/validate/build; spec:requirements:validate; weighted/fullplan/goal/control-plane validators; rp06:validate; git diff --check), with hermes_gate H06 'passed', production_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false. CP178+ hardening also verified end-to-end: attempt-01 (API Error: ConnectionRefused) was normalized to status invalid_review, valid_review=false, closeout_eligible=false, parsed_review=null — auth/CLI failures are not accepted as review evidence.
findings.recommendation: No action; retain command-evidence.json and the attempt-01 invalid receipt as audit provenance.
